name: Middlebury College
meets_full_need_notes: Middlebury meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students.
no_loan_notes: Middlebury includes loans in aid packages. Students may borrow up to $5,500/year; loan-free packages offered for families earning under $35,000.

merit_thresholds.notes: Middlebury offers a small number of merit awards (e.g., Middlebury Achievement Awards) but the vast majority of aid is need-based. Merit awards are folded into need-based packages.

ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive the same need-based aid as RD applicants. Middlebury commits to meeting full need regardless of admission round.
appeal_policy: Students may appeal their financial aid award by contacting the Student Financial Services office with documentation of changed circumstances or competing offers.
